visualGoal: Make a new pilot believe a real two-stick rig fits under $300 before they hit the binding, desk-space, and upgrade-path traps. Real HOSAS product proof throughout; no decorative/procedural art. Verdict-winning pick (WinWing Ursa Minor) is text-only until a verified photo exists — the biggest open visual gap.

realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: A file exists on disk at this path but is NOT in verified-product-images.json — do NOT embed until vision-verified. This is the article's VERDICT-WINNING budget-champion pick and carries zero verified images; it is text-only with an honest 'where to see it before you buy' callout. Verifying this photo is the top blocker to full certification parity and would let Tier 2 gain a shotgrid + gearpick. Confirm the Space (twist) variant, matched L+R pair.

A file exists on disk but is NOT verified. Kept text-only for TWO reasons: (1) unverified, and (2) it is a single-box HOTAS, not a HOSAS pair — it cannot be mirrored to an off hand, so it does not belong as a HOSAS gearpick even once verified. Referenced honestly as a different path with official link + Amazon search.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic desk sim-cockpit at cool blue rim light, two joystick mounting points on Monstertech-style clamp arms at a symmetric ambidextrous width, open overlay space for two real HOSAS stick product photos, keyboard visible for scale, curator Val Chen gesturing at the twin-stick layout, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake joysticks, warped grips, impossible ergonomics, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art, single-stick HOTAS layout

infographicPrompts.title: Pick your beginner HOSAS by commitment
content: Staying, want it good now -> WinWing Ursa Minor pair (~$220-260)
Will climb to endgame -> VKB Gladiator pair (~$240-300)
One-box HOTAS instead -> Logitech X52/X56 (not a HOSAS)
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center chart, large readable text, space colors, real stick photos as row markers for Codex overlay (WinWing/Logitech rows text-only until verified)

infographicPrompts.title: Beginner HOSAS buy order
content: 2 Buy BOTH sticks same cart (off-hand sells out)
5 Budget an evening to bind six axes
infographicPrompts.style: Numbered ladder, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult space-sim curator Val Chen at a clean desk cockpit, both hands resting on a symmetric twin-stick HOSAS layout, calm expert energy, product overlay space beside each stick, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.

openQuestions: Source + verify a real WinWing Ursa Minor Space photo — the verdict-winning pick has zero verified images; this is the top certification-parity blocker.
Confirm current T.16000M pair / Space Sim Duo bundle price, VKB Space Combat Edition US street price + stock, and WinWing Ursa Minor Space price (all left as ~$ ranges, never fabricated).
Do NOT verify/embed the Logitech X52 as a HOSAS gearpick even if a photo is sourced — it is a HOTAS and cannot be mirrored to an off hand.
